//deps: npm dep versions are the source of truth in ./package.json (read by BOTH runtimes). Deno consumes that node_modules via `nodeModulesDir: manual` — run `npm install` here first. Only jsr-only (`@std/*`) and Deno-specific subpath specifiers belong in `imports`; everything else npm resolves bare from package.json. Canonical-sync note lives in package.json now.
